description_long: This is a robust, single-bladed axe featuring a dark, roughly hewn wooden handle and a large, angular metal blade. The handle is cylindrical with a slightly irregular, hand-carved appearance, and is reinforced with leather straps wrapped around the upper section near the blade. The blade itself is broad, with a pronounced wedge shape and a sharp, beveled edge, suitable for chopping or splitting. The mounting of the blade to the handle is secured with visible leather bindings, giving it a rustic, utilitarian look. The overall finish is matte, with the wood showing natural grain and the metal blade exhibiting a dark, weathered patina. This axe would be at home in an urban garage, workshop, or as a tool for maintenance in parks and public spaces.
description: A rugged, single-bladed axe with a dark wooden handle and a large, angular metal blade, reinforced by leather straps. The design is rustic and utilitarian, with a matte finish and visible hand-crafted details.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top of the handle, showing the cylindrical shape and the leather bindings near the blade.
description_view_1: The blade is fully visible, displaying its broad, angular shape and the way it is attached to the handle with leather straps.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the bottom of the handle, highlighting the straightness and thickness of the handle and the pointed tip of the blade.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the blade is visible, showing the same broad, angular design and the secure leather bindings.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, dark wooden handle with a slightly irregular, hand-carved appearance, reinforced with leather straps near the blade; straight with a natural wood grain texture.
attribute_blade_design: Single, broad, angular steel blade with a sharp beveled edge and a pronounced wedge shape; no beard or poll, utilitarian design.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional, with the blade wedged and secured to the handle using leather straps.
